author: Carlos Gutierrez
sla: Complete within 4 hours of initiation, including all gate approvals
escalation_policy: If any gate is not approved within its timeout, escalate to the VP of Engineering and pause all downstream stages

stages.description: Compare the staging schema snapshot against the production schema and generate forward and rollback migration SQL
stages.input: Staging schema hash from latest successful CI build (commit abc3f91)
stages.output: Pair of SQL files: migrate-forward-041.sql and migrate-rollback-041.sql
stages.on_failure: Abort workflow and notify #data-platform Slack channel
stages.approval_criteria: DBA confirms no destructive column drops, verifies index impact estimates, and signs off on rollback safety

stages.description: Execute the forward migration against the shadow read-replica to validate execution time and catch runtime errors without touching production
stages.output: Execution log with timing per statement (target: under 90 seconds total)
stages.on_failure: Capture error log, run rollback on shadow, and halt pipeline
stages.approval_criteria: Shadow migration completed in under 90 seconds with zero errors and no lock contention detected in pg_stat_activity

stages.description: Post a scheduled maintenance notice on the public status page and activate the in-app banner for affected regions
stages.input: Maintenance window: 02:00–02:30 UTC, affected services: API, Dashboard
stages.output: Status page incident ID and confirmation of banner activation
stages.on_failure: Retry once; if still failing, proceed without banner but alert comms-team
stages.approval_criteria: Customer communications team confirms status page copy is accurate and enterprise account managers have been notified via email

stages.description: Apply the forward migration to the primary production database during the maintenance window
stages.output: Execution log confirming all statements succeeded and total duration
stages.on_failure: Immediately execute migrate-rollback-041.sql and page database-admins and senior-sre
stages.approval_criteria: Application health checks pass for 10 consecutive minutes, error rate stays below 0.1%, and p99 latency does not exceed pre-migration baseline by more than 15%

final_approval_criteria: Engineering director reviews migration summary, confirms monitoring dashboards are clean, and authorizes closing the maintenance window
deliverable: Migrated production database at schema version 041 with verified rollback capability and updated runbook
completion_notification: Post summary to #platform-infrastructure and #engineering-leads Slack channels, close status page incident, and update the migration registry in Confluence
